reason: Item 06 closes the JAX SurfaceRZFourier production-scale stellsym=False parity gap with a new test-only artifact. No source kernel was changed (surface_fourier_jax.py, surface_fourier_jax_cpu_ordered.py, surfacerzfourier.py, surfacexyzfourier.py, surfacexyztensorfourier.py, _surface_stellsym.py, jax_core/surface_rzfourier.py, and jax_core/surface_fourier.py are untouched). The new test executes the same surface_rz_fourier_*_from_spec / *_from_dofs entrypoints already covered at smaller scales; no new hot-path compute was introduced.

production_scale_floor.coverage_gap_closed: stellsym=False SurfaceRZFourier production-scale (nphi >= 16, ntheta >= 8) parity was not previously asserted; the existing _make_surface(stellsym=False) fixture in tests/geo/test_surface_rzfourier_jax.py runs at nphi=9, ntheta=10 only, and the production-scale HLO/Gauss-Bonnet fixtures pin stellsym=True.

dense_materialization_budget.rationale: Largest temporary in the new test is the (nphi, ntheta, 3) surface array per the surface_fourier_jax_transform plan. No new dense materialization was introduced.
